compiled_state.title: Write SC2 structural boundary test: brainstorm SKILL.md approval gate refuses on claude_auto+no-access contradiction
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## Task Description
Create tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh. The test asserts that brainstorm SKILL.md contains: (1) a contradiction gate section that documents the claude_auto + claude_has_access=no / claude_has_access=unknown refusal trigger, (2) the gate position within the Phase 2 approval gate flow, and (3) the confirmation-token requirement when verification_command is omitted.

Must fail (RED) until story 5202-46ec implements the contradiction gate text in brainstorm SKILL.md.

## Given / When / Then
- Given: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md exists
- When: the test checks for the SC2 contradiction gate refusal text
- Then: the test fails (RED) until story 5202-46ec adds the contradiction gate

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh
- [ ] Test test_contradiction_gate_section_exists asserts the contradiction gate section exists in brainstorm SKILL.md
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_contradiction_gate_section_exists
- [ ] Test test_gate_refuses_on_claude_auto_no_access asserts the specific refusal condition is documented
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_gate_refuses_on_claude_auto_no_access
- [ ] Test test_audit_token_requirement_documented asserts verification-less entries require confirmation token
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh 2>&1 | grep -q test_audit_token_requirement_documented
- [ ] Test exits non-zero (RED) when run against current SKILL.md before 5202-46ec is implemented
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh; echo exit:$?
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker [test_gate_refuses_on_claude_auto_no_access] for plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep '\[test_gate_refuses_on_claude_auto_no_access\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test is auto-discovered by tests/skills/run-skill-bash-tests.sh
  Verify: ls $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-external-dep-sc2-brainstorm.sh
